concierge.title: The AI Concierge
concierge.subtitle: Your 24/7 Private Banker. Manage savings goals or request emergency capital instantly.
concierge.securityText: All requests, personal emergencies, and financial data shared with The Concierge are locally encrypted before reaching the database. Only the AI and the CEO can decrypt this. Your vulnerable moments are 100% secure.
concierge.emergencyDesc: Emergency (e.g., broken washing machine)? Enter the amount. The AI decides within 5 minutes. If it risks your living allowance (VTLB), it escalates to the CEO for approval.
concierge.goalDesc: Set a Luxury goal (e.g., Vacation or Car). Orion automatically and invisibly deducts micro-amounts from your profits until the goal is reached.

opportunities.title: The Opportunity Engine
opportunities.subtitle: Orion scans global trends, generates business cases, and builds autonomous ad campaigns.
opportunities.testingDesc: Launch micro-budget ads to validate traction live.
opportunities.forgeDesc: AI-Generated media is ready for A/B testing. No human input required.

godMode.title: The Command Center
godMode.subtitle: Your overarching dashboard. Manage emergencies and launch attacks on the market.
